user_feedback: whenever I land on the triangle, I want to have a boost of acceleration, so visual flair of like fire behind my car and also be invincible for an amount of time, and then I also want to have way more coins,
analysis:
- Issue identified: The ramp obstacle (triangle) needs to provide a more exciting power-up experience with visual fire effects, invincibility, and the game needs more coins overall
- Files affected: globals.js (coin spawn rate and boost constants), entities.js (fire particle effects and invincibility on boost), collision.js (enhance visual feedback)
- Changes needed:
  1. Increase coin spawn rate significantly (reduce COIN_SPAWN_INTERVAL)
  2. Add invincibility frames when hitting ramp
  3. Enhance fire/flame particle effects behind car during ramp boost
  4. Add constant for ramp invincibility duration
